title: palicourea paulina
intro: Palicourea paulina, also known as the "Yellow Tabebuia," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Palicourea paulina include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in many cultures. Herbal preparations of Palicourea paulina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
